title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 103.158 - Premiums to be paid by participating agencies — deposit into fund
text:
103.158.  Premiums to be paid by participating agencies — deposit into fund. — Monthly, in accordance with a schedule developed by the board, or its designee, each participating member agency shall pay all applicable premium amounts to the executive director.  The premium amounts so remitted will be promptly deposited by the executive director in the benefit trust fund account.
(L. 1992 H.B. 1574 § 4 subsec. 9, A.L. 1996 H.B. 1400)
